---
title: "Research"
subtitle: "BioAI, molecular intelligence, networks, and the science of trustworthy AI"
description: "BioMIND research thrusts spanning BioAI, molecular ML, foundation models, complex systems, trustworthy AI, and agentic AI for science."
---

BioMIND organizes its research around **BioAI**, **molecular intelligence**, **biological foundation models**, **network science**, **complex adaptive systems**, **trustworthy AI**, **human-centered AI**, and **agentic AI for scientific discovery**. The cluster is BioAI-first while maintaining strong foundations in complex systems, explainability, information dynamics, and responsible intelligent systems.

The portfolio is approximately **70% BioAI / AI for biology** and **30% complex systems, networks, and trustworthy AI** — a balance that allows methodological advances and biological applications to inform each other.

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🧬]{.bm-card-icon}
### BioAI & AI for Biology
Foundational ML and computational tools for biological data — sequences, structures, networks, and dynamics — to accelerate discovery.

[Explore →](bioai.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[⚛️]{.bm-card-icon}
### Molecular Machine Learning & Generative Discovery
Geometric and generative models for molecular property prediction and de novo design.

[Explore →](molecular-ml.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🔬]{.bm-card-icon}
### Biomolecular Foundation Models
Pretraining and adaptation of large-scale models for proteins, mRNA, and multimodal biomolecular data.

[Explore →](foundation-models.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🌐]{.bm-card-icon}
### Network Science & Complex Adaptive Systems
Collective dynamics, information flows, and emergent behavior in biological, social, and cyber-social systems.

[Explore →](complex-systems.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🧠]{.bm-card-icon}
### Explainable, Trustworthy & Human-Centered AI
Interpretability, fairness, accountability, and human-aligned design in high-stakes AI.

[Explore →](trustworthy-ai.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🤖]{.bm-card-icon}
### Agentic AI for Scientific Discovery
LLM-driven and multi-agent systems that plan, hypothesize, and iterate with humans in scientific workflows.

[Explore →](agentic-ai.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

:::

## Cross-Cutting Themes

Across the six thrusts, the cluster emphasizes a set of cross-cutting themes:

- **Foundation models** — pretraining, adaptation, and evaluation across biological and scientific data
- **Generative modeling** — diffusion, flow matching, and autoregressive design across modalities
- **Reasoning and agents** — combining LLMs, tools, and structured knowledge for scientific reasoning
- **Trustworthiness** — interpretability, robustness, fairness, and human alignment
- **Systems thinking** — networks, dynamics, and emergence at biological and social scales

## How research is conducted

BioMIND projects typically involve co-advised students, shared compute infrastructure, and tight coupling between method development and scientific application. We publish in venues spanning machine learning (NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR), computational biology (RECOMB, ISMB, *Nature Computational Science*), network science (NetSci, *Nature Communications*), and human-centered AI (CHI, FAccT).
